layout.selectDesk: Select a desk to get started

deskPanel.riskManager: Risk Manager — Position sizing & risk review

paperTradingView.title: Paper Trading
paperTradingView.noSession: No active paper trading session. Start one from the Properties panel.
paperTradingView.waitingForOutput: Waiting for freqtrade output... (bot heartbeat every minute, entry signals when strategy triggers)

wizard.title: New Desk
wizard.nameYourDeskDesc: This is the workspace for your trading strategy.
wizard.stocksDescription: US equities, options via Interactive Brokers
wizard.pickMarketDesc: What asset class do you want to trade? You can change venues later, but not the market.
wizard.selectVenuesDesc: Where do you trade? Select one or more. This cannot be changed later.
wizard.modeDesc: Classic runs on candles (TA, indicators, minute-to-hour). Real-time reacts to every tick and order book update. Cards disabled for the selected venues are not available.
wizard.classicModeDesc: Candle-based polling strategies. TA indicators, trend following, mean reversion, momentum. Minute to hour timeframes.
wizard.realtimeModeDesc: Event-driven strategies reacting to ticks and order book deltas. Market making, arbitrage, HFT. Sub-second timeframes.
wizard.modeNotAvailable: Not available for the selected venues.
wizard.noModeWarning: The selected venues have no managed strategy mode. Paper trading will not be available — pick different venues to enable Classic or Real-time.
wizard.configureAgentDesc: Choose how the AI agent will run tasks for this desk.
wizard.adapterCheckDesc: Runs a probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
wizard.cliNotFound: {{adapter}} CLI not found or not responding.
wizard.chooseStrategyDesc: Pick from catalog or let the agent write one from scratch.
wizard.customStrategyDetailDesc: The agent will write strategy code based on your description
wizard.configureConstraintsDesc: Set budget and risk parameters for this desk.
wizard.classicDescription: Candle-based technical analysis — trend following, mean reversion, momentum. Powered by Freqtrade.
wizard.realtimeDescription: Event-driven tick-level strategies — market making, arbitrage, HFT. Powered by Nautilus Trader.
wizard.missionPlaceholder: What is this strategy trying to achieve? (write in the language you want the agent to reply in)
wizard.missionHint: Minimum 10 characters. The agent matches its response language to this description on the first turn.
wizard.customStrategyPlaceholder: e.g. A momentum strategy that buys when RSI crosses above 30 and sells when it crosses below 70. Use a 14-period RSI on 1h candles. Add a stop-loss at 2% and take-profit at 5%. Trade only during high-volume hours...
wizard.seedCodeHint: Contents are copied into the desk workspace at creation.
wizard.noDatasetsYet: Nothing in the catalog yet. Datasets downloaded by any desk's agent will appear here and can be linked on future desks without a re-download.

settings.title: Desk Settings
settings.exportDesc: Export this desk as a JSON package (settings, strategy, experiments) or import from a file.
settings.archiveDesc: Archive this desk to hide it from the sidebar. This cannot be undone.
settings.setAtCreation: Set at creation. Create a new desk to change venues or strategy.
